overall.description: A first-person walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk urban plaza at night, passing food vendors, vending machines, and holographic advertisements. The scene features wet reflective concrete, Japanese signage, and scattered pedestrians in a futuristic game environment.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a covered food stall counter with cooking equipment and green glass bottles in the foreground. Two vendors are working behind the counter while neon signs and a large red neon tree decoration illuminate the background. The camera moves steadily forward under the sheltered area.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered stall area, the scene opens into a wide plaza with wet reflective concrete. The camera passes trash and recycling bins while approaching a row of illuminated vending machines in the distance. A person in a red jacket crouches near the bins on the right.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a corridor of brightly lit vending machines with neon advertisements. A large vertical billboard displaying 16 FLAVORS rises on the left while a rotating purple holographic sphere glows in the center distance. Pedestrians walk through the area, and the ground shows scattered litter.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with large digital billboards and outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: walking past large vertical billboard toward open seating area with scattered litter

entered.detail: wooden tables and chairs with green stools
upper level walkway with railings and hanging plants

segments.scene_description: Moving past the large vertical billboard which now dominates the left side of the frame, the scene opens into a wider plaza area with outdoor seating and an elevated walkway above. The vending machines recede into the background as the camera continues forward through the neon-lit environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate shelter of a food stall into the expansive, neon-drenched openness of a cyberpunk plaza. It begins under a covered counter amidst cooking equipment and green glass bottles, moving past vendors and a glowing red neon tree. As the camera exits the sheltered area, the scene opens onto wet reflective concrete where it passes recycling bins and a crouching figure in a red jacket toward a row of illuminated vending machines. The movement then carries the viewer through a corridor of neon advertisements and a rotating purple holographic sphere, passing a towering vertical billboard displaying 16 FLAVORS. Finally, the camera moves beyond the billboard into a wider plaza featuring outdoor seating and an elevated walkway, leaving the vending machines behind as it pushes deeper into the futuristic urban environment.
